commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 536573256060.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com >/dev/null
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull app migrate textract-worker >/tmp/trueblue-repull.log 2>&1
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile setup run --rm migrate >/tmp/trueblue-remigrate.log 2>&1
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --force-recreate app textract-worker nginx >/tmp/trueblue-reup.log 2>&1

for i in $(seq 1 36); do status=$(docker inspect true-blue-platform-app-1 --format "{{.State.Health.Status}}" 2>/dev/null || echo starting); echo "app_health=$status"; [ "$status" = healthy ] && break; sleep 5; done
